title: The Quran Said Iron Came From the Sky. Science Just Caught Up.

sound.ambient: deep space cosmic ambience, low airy hum, vast and clean, subtle shimmer, no music, no melody, no instruments

_note: Quran-science miracle, modern fast-cut style, >60s for monetization. New scene almost every line. No recitation = copyright-free. No em dashes.

segments.text: The Quran said something about iron… that took science fourteen hundred years to understand.
segments.caption: Iron · Quran 57:25

segments.text: It said iron was sent down.
segments.caption: "We sent down iron"

segments.text: Down? From where?
segments.caption: From where?

segments.text: For centuries, that made no sense.
segments.caption: It made no sense.

segments.text: Then we learned the truth.
segments.caption: Then, the truth.

segments.text: Iron cannot be created on Earth.
segments.caption: Not made on Earth.

segments.text: It can only be forged… in the heart of a dying star.
segments.caption: Forged in dying stars.

segments.sfx: deep low ominous impact, single hollow boom, dark
segments.text: And when that star explodes…
segments.caption: Then it explodes.

segments.text: it scatters iron across the universe.
segments.caption: Scattered everywhere.

segments.text: raining it down… onto worlds.
segments.caption: Raining down.

segments.text: Including ours.
segments.caption: Including ours.

segments.text: Every atom of iron on Earth… fell from the sky.
segments.caption: Stellar nucleosynthesis

segments.text: But it did not stop there.
segments.caption: It went deeper.

segments.text: The iron sank to the center of the Earth… and became its core.
segments.caption: Earth's iron core

segments.text: A churning ocean of molten metal.
segments.caption: Molten iron.

segments.text: And that core… creates a shield.
segments.caption: A magnetic shield.

segments.text: An invisible field, wrapping the entire planet.
segments.caption: It wraps the Earth.

segments.text: Deflecting deadly radiation… from the sun.
segments.caption: It blocks radiation.

segments.text: Without it… life here could not exist.
segments.caption: No shield, no life.

segments.text: And even the iron in your blood… is stardust.
segments.caption: You are stardust.

segments.text: Strength… and protection. Exactly as He called it… fourteen hundred years ago.
segments.caption: Quran 57:25

segments.text: Want more like this? Get Ketabi, free, at Ketabi Studio dot com.
segments.caption: Download Ketabi.

sources: Quran 57:25 - 'and We sent down iron, in which is great strength and benefits for people'
Stellar nucleosynthesis - iron forms in massive stars; supernovae disperse it; Earth's iron is of cosmic origin
Earth's liquid iron outer core generates the geomagnetic field that shields life from solar and cosmic radiation
